response.justification: Maria is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js skills, AWS exposure, and recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling — directly relevant to this role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and her AI experience only begins in 2025. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on cloud platforms at scale, which are core required qualifications for this staff-level GenAI position.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience
Deep full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS CDK
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related experience versus the required 8+ years
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Limited demonstrated experience leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale
